daily.title: CRITICAL DISCOVERY: Telegram Bot-to-Bot Blindne...
daily.content:
**Unknown time**: CRITICAL DISCOVERY: Telegram Bot-to-Bot Blindness
### Root Cause
Telegram API explicitly states: **"Bot admins and bots with privacy mode disabled will receive all messages except messages sent by other bots."**

**Unknown time**: Other Changes Today
- [09:57] Captain identity updated: name is Luffy, universal law added to UNIVERSAL-AGENT-RULES.md + USER.md + MEMORY.md
- [10:05] Updated timeout protocol in UNIVERSAL-AGENT-RULES.md (120s minimum for sessions_send)

**Unknown time**: Key Findings
- Bot-to-bot Telegram relay: ALWAYS use sessions_send, target agent:<name>:main (not topic sessions)
- 409 getUpdates: Known OpenClaw bug, persists through update to 2026.3.24. May need full process kill + clean start.
